title: Provenance
description: Provenance metadata schema. Tracks the origin, version, and lineage of data, schemas, or calculation results within the micro-costing system.

source.description: Name of the source system or data origin

schemaVersion.description: Version of the schema or contract that produced the data

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the data was generated

generatedBy.description: Identifier of the tool, service, or user that generated the data

inputDigest.description: Cryptographic hash (SHA-256 hex) of the input data for reproducibility
